name: zone
description: Configuration keywords for 'plot item create zone'. Controls continuum zone rendering, coloring, cut planes, labels, and legends for FLAC2D/FLAC3D results.

basic_keywords.description: Show the zone item in the plot.
Hide the zone item without removing it.
Set zone transparency where supported by the plot item.
Show a legend for color-mapped zone values.
Configure continuous or named color mapping.
basic_keywords.syntax: color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Color zones by result values, model state, groups, or extra variables.

sub_items.name: cut
sub_items.description: Clip the zone visualization with a 2D or 3D cutting region.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create zone active on color-by text-attribute "group" 'Any' color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true legend active on
plot item create zone active on color-by vector-attribute "displacement" color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic legend active on

common_usage_patterns.use_case: Zones colored by maximum principal stress
common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create zone active on color-by numeric-attribute "stress-prin-max" color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic legend active on
